Kidplokio 8pc Urban City Fire Truck Friction Powered Toy Cars with Play Mat,

Calling all little firefighters in training! This fun fire truck themed playset includes one play mat, two fire truck vehicles and five traffic signs. Toddlers and little kids will love zooming over town to the next emergency or rescue mission with the friction powered fire truck toys!

Featuring two fun, fire truck toys, these fire rescue themed vehicles are easy to play with once kids learn and understand the mechanics of friction power! With a simple pull, little ones can crime fight all across the city from one accident to the next! In addition to the two fire truck toys, this play set comes with an awesome felt play mat. Measuring 31 x 27 inches (80cm x 70cm), the felt play mat features a sprawling urban city map with lots of pit stops for little firefighters to drive to; when playtime is over, the floor mat folds up neatly for tidy storage.

Key Features

  • URBAN CITY TOY CARS PLAYSET: Calling all little firefighters in training! This fun fire rescue themed playset includes one play mat, two fire truck vehicles and five traffic signs; kids will love zooming all over town to the next fire emergency with the friction powered fire truck toys!
  • FRICTION POWERED FIRE TRUCK TOYS: Featuring two fire truck toy cars, these firefighter themed vehicles are easy to play with! With a simple pull, little ones can race across the play to the next emergency, whether it's a neighborhood cat rescue or urban city building fire!
  • AWESOME URBAN CITY PLAY MAT: Measuring 31 x 27 inches (80cm x 70cm), this super fun felt play mat features a sprawling urban city map with lots of pit stops for little firefighters to visit; and, when playtime is over, the play mat folds up neatly for tidy storage and playroom organization
  • PRETEND PLAY AND FINE MOTOR TOYS: Not only will your little hero be thrilled conjuring up lots of imaginative pretend play firefighting rescue missions, kids will also be developing their fine motor skills, hand eye coordination and dexterity maneuvering the fire truck toys and traffic signs too!
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11 x 3 x 16 inches; Weight: 1.02lbs; Color: Blue: Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KP-RLUT-FD21
  • UPC: 810058485182
  • Color: Fire Station
  • Size: Medium

And, not only will your little hero be thrilled conjuring up lots of imaginative pretend play fire rescue scenarios, kids will also be developing their fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination and dexterity while maneuvering the fire truck toys, other toy cars and traffic signs across the play mat. A great value toy car playset kids can use in conjunction with other toys too, sure to spark imagination and playtime creativity!

Let the fire rescue missions begin!

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts
